reach_why: Extends known critiques of representation bias and premature pruning, but does not open wholly unprecedented explanatory territory.
novelty_why: Non-obviously links parser ontology, tractability narrowing, and weak linguistic filters into one failure mode.
falsifiable_why: Test by comparing discovery rates under fixed parsers versus ontology-expanding systems on anomalous truths.
explanation: Discovery can fail upstream when parsers and early narrowing exclude strange but true conceptual possibilities.
